headline: Is PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is PYPL a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on PayPal Holdings, Inc. on High Growth Investing’s Substack by Stefan Waldhauser. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on PYPL. PayPal Holdings, Inc.’s share was trading at $44.90 as of March 13th. PYPL’s trailing and forward P/E were 8.30 and 8.53 respectively according […]

headline: Should HP’s US$1 Billion AI Cost-Savings Plan and AI PCs Strategy Require Action From HPQ Investors?
summary: Earlier this month, HP Inc.’s CFO Karen Parkhill used the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference 2026 to outline how the company is responding to higher memory costs and softer demand while investing in AI PCs, secure printing, subscriptions, and AI-enabled cost savings initiatives. Her comments highlighted HP’s plan to unlock US$1.00 billion of AI-enabled cost savings by fiscal 2028, underscoring management’s focus on efficiency alongside new AI-focused products and...
